title: Kesari Tours is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Kesari Tours is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Kesari Tours in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kesari Tours:
Kesari Tours is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kesari Tours!
